scores.correctness_notes: All three required elements (HTTP health check, custom environment variables, log target) are correctly structured. Services have `override`, `command`, `startup`, `environment`, `on-check-failure`. Checks have correct `level`, `period`, `timeout`, `threshold`, `http.url`. Log target has correct `type: loki`, `location`, `services`, `labels`. Extra fields (`on-success`, `backoff-delay/factor/limit`, `kill-delay`, `user`, `group`, `working-dir`, `after`, `requires`) are all valid Pebble service fields, not errors.
